title: Stage 4 — refinement Q&A (deterministic, rule-based)
description: Zero or more refinement rounds. The resolver fires this stage when keyword_mapping has unmapped_terms / medium-or-low confidence, or when contract_resolution would have missing/ambiguous inputs. Question kinds are locked. The funnel guards against infinite loops by capping at 3 rounds. See LLM_FUNNEL_SPEC.md §4.

round.description: 1-indexed. After round 3 the funnel escalates rather than loop further.

question_id.description: Stable id used as the key in the matching refinement_answer_v1.answers map.

context.description: Optional one-line explanation of why this question is being asked (audit trail).

description.description: Optional sub-line shown under the label.

options.description: Required when kind is pick_one or pick_multiple. Each option's id is what lands in the answer.

default.description: Default value for kind=confirm or free_text.
